sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: JPMorgan USD emerging markets sovereign bond ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.2101
feed.summary: The JPMorgan USD Emerging Markets Sovereign Bond ETF (JPMB) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.2101 per share. This announcement provides investors with information regarding the upcoming payout from the ETF.

feed.title: BSX 72 HOUR DEADLINE REMINDER: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Boston Scientific (BSX) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on May 4, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding Boston Scientific (BSX) investors of the May 4, 2026 deadline to seek the role of lead plaintiff in a federal securities class action. The lawsuit alleges that Boston Scientific and its executives made misleading statements about the company's U.S. EP segment, leading to a significant stock price drop on February 4, 2026, after the company announced a net income miss and underwhelming guidance for fiscal 2026. Investors who purchased BSX securities between July 23, 2025, and February 3, 2026, and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the law firm.

feed.title: Costco (COST) Introduces Bottled Water Option with $1.50 Hot Dog Combo
feed.summary: Costco (COST) has updated its long-standing $1.50 hot dog combo to include a bottled water option, a change welcomed by customers seeking healthier choices. Despite a projected annual impact of $300 million on profits, this move is expected to bolster customer loyalty and increase store traffic. The company currently holds a strong GF Score™ of 98/100, though its P/E ratio indicates a premium valuation.

feed.title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Healthcare Companies: Amgen (AMGN), Immunome (IMNM) and Resmed (RMD)
feed.summary: Analysts have issued conflicting ratings for several healthcare companies. RBC Capital and BMO Capital maintain Buy ratings for Amgen (AMGN) with price targets of $370.00 and $400.00 respectively, while Immunome (IMNM) received a Strong Buy consensus with a target of $35.36 from Lake Street and Piper Sandler. Resmed (RMD) received a Hold rating from Needham and a downgrade to Hold from TipRanks – xAI, though the overall consensus remains a Moderate Buy.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) and Asure (ASUR)
feed.summary: RBC Capital maintained a "Hold" rating on Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) with a $325.00 price target, while Northland Securities downgraded it to "Hold." RBC Capital also maintained a "Buy" rating on Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) with a $200.00 price target, and Needham reiterated a "Buy" rating on Asure (ASUR) with a $15.00 price target. The article highlights analyst sentiment and price targets for these technology companies.

feed.title: Sandro Wealth Management LLC Purchases New Position in Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH
feed.summary: Sandro Wealth Management LLC has acquired a new stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH), purchasing 2,036 shares valued at approximately $1.79 million in the fourth quarter, making it their 24th largest position. This comes as institutional investors now own 82.44% of the company. Despite Parker-Hannifin beating Q3 earnings estimates and raising FY-2026 EPS guidance, its stock fell after the announcement due to a "sell-the-news" reaction and notable insider selling.

feed.title: 3,167 Shares in Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated $VRTX Bought by Sandro Wealth Management LLC
feed.summary: Sandro Wealth Management LLC acquired a new stake of 3,167 shares, valued at $1.436 million, in Vertex Pharmaceuticals during the fourth quarter. Analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for VRTX, with an average target price of $554.83, as the company reported Q4 earnings that slightly missed consensus estimates but showed a 9.5% increase in revenue year-over-year.

feed.title: Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE:D) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE:D) reported strong Q1 2026 operating earnings of $0.95 per share, surpassing expectations, and reiterated its financial guidance including a 5% to 7% annual earnings growth. The company highlighted significant progress on the Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind (CVOW) project, which is over 75% complete, and discussed expanded opportunities in grid-scale energy storage in Virginia due to new legislation. Additionally, Dominion Energy noted continued high demand from data centers and addressed ongoing rate cases in South and North Carolina, as well as the recontracting process for its Millstone nuclear facility.

feed.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE:IVR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE:IVR) held its Q1 2026 earnings call, announcing Kevin Collins as the new CEO and discussing a challenging quarter due to market volatility, geopolitical tensions, and inflation concerns. Despite a 7.9% decline in book value, the company highlighted a stronger capital structure, increased allocation to Agency TBA, and attractive leveraged returns on Agency RMBS. Management expressed optimism for future performance given improved supply/demand dynamics for agency mortgages and reduced geopolitical tensions.

feed.title: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS Has $20.39 Million Stock Holdings in Verisk Analytics, Inc. $VRSK
feed.summary: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS increased its holdings in Verisk Analytics, Inc. by 17.0% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total ownership to 91,145 shares valued at approximately $20.39 million. Verisk Analytics also announced a $2.50 billion share repurchase program and a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share. The company reported a Q1 earnings beat and has a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $238.20.

feed.title: Integer Holdings Corporation (NYSE:ITGR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Integer Holdings Corporation (NYSE: ITGR) reported its Q1 2026 earnings, missing EPS expectations by $0.01 with adjusted EPS of $1.20. The company updated its 2026 financial outlook, lowering sales expectations due to customer forecast adjustments and increasing risk adjustments, particularly impacting electrophysiology. Integer's board also announced the initiation of a strategic review to explore options for maximizing shareholder value, acknowledging heightened interest in the company.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Company reported solid Q1 2026 earnings with adjusted EBITDA up 120% over the prior quarter, totaling $308 million. The company highlighted advancements in its Wood Products growth strategy, including new product launches and expanded distribution, and completed a $192 million divestiture of non-core timberlands. Despite macroeconomic uncertainties and a sluggish housing market, Weyerhaeuser remains optimistic about long-term housing fundamentals and its operational performance, focusing on cost control and strategic investments.

feed.title: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS Has $7.78 Million Stock Position in Marathon Petroleum Corporation $MPC

Despite this reduction, other institutional investors have increased their positions, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $241.81 for MPC. The company recently reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue expectations, and declared a $1.00 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Laureate Education, Inc. (NASDAQ:LAUR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Laureate Education, Inc. reported its Q1 2026 earnings, beating expectations with a reported EPS of $-0.17 against an expected $-0.24256. The company reaffirmed its full-year guidance for enrollments, revenue, and adjusted EBITDA, while increasing its adjusted EPS guidance to reflect $105 million in share buybacks. Enrollment results showed a 13% year-over-year new enrollment growth in Peru and 4% in Mexico, driven by strong penetration in online offerings for working adults in Peru.

feed.title: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS Sells 5,372 Shares of General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS reduced its stake in General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) by 4.9% in the fourth quarter, selling 5,372 shares and retaining 104,169 shares valued at $35.07 million. This move comes as General Dynamics reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and raised its FY26 EPS guidance, leading to positive analyst sentiment and increased price targets from several major firms. Despite some insider selling, institutional ownership remains high at 86.14%, and the company recently increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Moderna, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRNA) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Moderna, Inc. reported its Q1 2026 earnings, missing EPS expectations due to a significant litigation settlement, but reaffirmed its full-year revenue growth target of up to 10%. The company highlighted significant progress in its commercial portfolio and pipeline, including new regulatory approvals for its flu and COVID combo vaccine in the EU and advancements in its oncology and rare disease programs. Moderna leadership detailed their strategy for various clinical trials and market access for new products, emphasizing continued investment in AI and disciplined cost management.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $0.97. The company saw accelerated organic sales growth, particularly in emerging markets and Asia Pacific, and maintained its full-year top and bottom-line guidance despite anticipated gross margin pressure due to increased raw material and logistics costs, including an assumed oil price of $110. Management remains committed to strategic investments in brands, innovation, and productivity initiatives such as the expanded SG&PP program (now at $200-$300 million in savings) to offset inflation and drive long-term growth.

feed.title: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) exceeded Q1 2026 earnings expectations with an adjusted EPS of $0.95 and organic sales growth of 5%. The strong performance was driven by volume, market share gains in key brands like TheraBreath and ARM & HAMMER, and aggressive innovation, despite a dynamic consumer environment and inflation. The company reiterated its full-year 2026 outlook for organic sales growth of 3-4% and EPS growth of 5-8%, planning to offset an estimated $25-$30 million in commodity and transportation inflation through productivity rather than price increases.

feed.title: Linde plc (NASDAQ:LIN) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Linde plc reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with EPS of $4.33, beating expectations, and saw 10% EPS growth, 30% operating margins, and a healthy 24% return on capital despite a challenging economic backdrop. The company provided an updated 2026 guidance, expecting Q2 EPS between $4.40 and $4.50, and full-year EPS of $17.60 to $17.90, reflecting confidence in business resilience but remaining cautious due to geopolitical volatility. Key growth drivers included electronics and food and beverage, while the Americas showed strong industrial activity, offsetting weakness in EMEA.

feed.title: Lear Corporation (NYSE:LEA) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Lear Corporation (NYSE: LEA) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with revenue up 5% to $5.8 billion and adjusted EPS increasing 24% to $3.87, exceeding expectations. The company highlighted significant new business wins in both its Seating and E-Systems segments, particularly with Chinese automakers and a major GM full-size SUV wire harness award. Despite global macroeconomic uncertainties and tariff-related revenue adjustments, Lear maintained its full-year 2026 outlook, expressing confidence in its operational execution, disciplined capital allocation strategy, and growing backlog to drive continued shareholder value.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp $USB Shares Acquired by Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS

feed.title: Executive VP & CFO Of Northern Trust Sold 40% Of Their Shares
feed.summary: Northern Trust's Executive VP & CFO, David Fox, recently sold US$3.3 million worth of stock, reducing his holding by 40%. This follows another significant insider sale by the Executive VP & COO, Peter Cherecwich, for US$3.7 million in the last year, although at a lower price. While insiders at Northern Trust sold more shares than they bought over the past year, they still maintain a 1.5% ownership, valued at US$474 million.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) held its Q1 2026 earnings call, discussing strong first-quarter performance driven by low bad debt and enhanced resident credit screening, despite a slowdown in consumer sentiment. The company highlighted leadership changes, its continued commitment to succession planning, and robust market demand in Sunbelt metros, particularly Texas, due to job growth and population increases. Management also provided updates on the California sales process, capital allocation strategies including share repurchases and acquisitions, and an outlook for improved growth in the latter half of 2026 and into 2027 as new supply is absorbed.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with combined Brokerage and Risk Management segments' revenue growing by 28% and adjusted EBITDAC growth of 18%. The company highlighted its successful two-pronged strategy of organic growth (5%) and M&A (23%), driven significantly by the AssuredPartners acquisition. Despite some property pricing moderation, the company maintains a positive full-year organic growth outlook of 6%, attributing its success to strong new business wins, client retention, and effective use of technology like AI.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries, Inc. (NYSE:MHK) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) reported Q1 2026 adjusted EPS of $1.90, up 25% year-over-year, with net sales of $2.7 billion. The company navigated a challenging environment marked by inflation and volume shifts, implementing productivity and restructuring efforts. Despite ongoing macroeconomic uncertainties, particularly due to the Middle East conflict's impact on energy prices and consumer confidence, Mohawk expects Q2 adjusted EPS between $2.50 and $2.60 and is focused on strategic price increases and cost control.

feed.title: Analysts Are Updating Their Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) Estimates After Its Third-Quarter Results

feed.title: April Review: Markets Advance Through Global Volatility - Raymond James - Commentaries
feed.summary: April saw markets advance despite global volatility driven by energy prices, inflation, and geopolitical risks, particularly the conflict in the Middle East. Equity markets, led by the tech sector, saw strong gains with the S&P 500 reaching new highs. While elevated energy prices persist and inflation remains a concern, consumer resilience and stable labor markets suggest underlying economic strength.
